description: Designed for everyday use, this messenger bag from wrangler is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. With ample space to stash away daily belongings, it makes for a perfect bag to college as well as work.Made of canvas with complete protective nylon lining for easy cleaning and durabilityButton holders and straps made of synthetic leatherTwo fabric compartments on the front held by leather tang clasps One main compartment Two side buttoned organizerWide adjustable strap to customise lengthLeather patchwork below the base for added durability and structureCareDo not washDo not dry-cleanUse mild brush to dust if necessary
